title: pavonia alba
intro: Pavonia alba, also known as White Pavonia or White Rock Rose, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pavonia alba include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal properties, and can also be applied topically to the skin as a salve or poultice.
